response.justification: Exceeds the 6+ years requirement with 13+ years of full-stack experience and a strong match on core technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, databases, Docker/Kubernetes). Current role at re:cinq involves full-stack work with TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure, directly aligning with role needs. Primary concern is React and Nest.js not explicitly mentioned in resume—frontend background is Ember.js—though demonstrated ability to learn frameworks quickly across his career.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience with proven ownership of complex systems and scaling challenges
Strong match on TypeScript, Node.js, databases (MongoDB/PostgreSQL), Docker/Kubernetes, and testing-first mindset
Active AI-agent and MCP infrastructure experience in current role; diverse language proficiency (10+)
concerns: React not explicitly mentioned; primary frontend experience is Ember.js rather than the role's primary stack
Nest.js framework not mentioned despite Node.js expertise across multiple roles
Authentication/authorization and cloud-platform details (AWS CDK mentioned, but GCP/Azure coverage unclear) not prominent in resume

key_factors.factor: Extensive full-stack seniority and AI-agent expertise
React/Nest.js framework gaps despite general capability
